message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant JobManager
participant "Process/Application" as PA
participant ESDM
participant "Post Processing" as PP
database "Storage System" as SS
actor Observer

== Observer ==

Observer -> Observer : collects observations
Observer -> SS : (may write directly)
Observer -> ESDM : write observation t
ESDM -> ESDM : (transform for efficiency)
ESDM -> SS : write container for observation t

== Simulation Runs ==

JobManager -> JobManager : periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT)
User -> JobManager : allocates resources and calls
JobManager -> PA : read IN=x
PA -> SS : read
SS -> PA : return
PA -> JobManager : return
PA -> PA : compute
PA -> ESDM : write async OUT=y

== Value-added products ==

ESDM -> PP : make available
PP -> PP : perform analysis
PP -> SS : (may write directly)
PP -> ESDM : return result
ESDM -> PA : return

note over PA, ESDM : multiple iterations

== Finalise ==

SS -> User : OUT files become visible

@enduml
